query_name:
SELECT
  a.ca_state AS state,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM READ_PARQUET('customer_address.parquet') AS a, READ_PARQUET('customer.parquet') AS c, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_partitioned_freq/store_sales/**/*.parquet', hive_partitioning = 1) AS s, READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_partitioned_freq/date_dim/**/*.parquet', hive_partitioning = 1) AS d, READ_PARQUET('item.parquet') AS i
WHERE
  a.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
  AND c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
  AND s.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  AND s.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  AND d.d_month_seq = (
      SELECT DISTINCT
        (
          d_month_seq
        )
      FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_partitioned_freq/date_dim/**/*.parquet', hive_partitioning = 1) AS date_dim
      WHERE
        d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 1
  )
  AND i.i_current_price > 1.2 * (
      SELECT
        AVG(j.i_current_price)
      FROM READ_PARQUET('item.parquet') AS j
      WHERE
        j.i_category = i.i_category
  )
GROUP BY
  a.ca_state
HAVING
  COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY
  cnt NULLS FIRST,
  a.ca_state NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 100

extra_info.Conditions: i_category IS NOT DISTINCT FROM i_category

Projections: CASE  WHEN ((#1 > 1)) THEN ("error"('More than one row returned by a subquery used as an expression - scalar subqueries can only return a single row.
Use "SET scalar_subquery_error_on_multiple_rows=false" to revert to previous behavior of returning a random row.')) ELSE #0 END

extra_info.Conditions: i_category IS NOT DISTINCT FROM i_category
